title: Human Pituitary Adenoma Proteomics: New Progresses and Perspectives.
author: Zhan X Wang X Cheng T
content: S-EPMC4885873 PMC4885873 Human Pituitary Adenoma Proteomics: New Progresses and Perspectives. Pituitary adenoma (PA) is a common intracranial neoplasm that impacts on human health through interfering hypothalamus-pituitary-target organ axis systems. The development of proteomics gives great
